creator: wolfgardt@hotmail.de
text:
I am not able to Install FreeBSD 6.1 on my FSC Amilo M3438G with Raid 0
(Via VT 6421). The setup is not able to detect my raid configuration correct.

I get ad4, ad6 and ar0. But all drives complain about wrong drive geometry.
I also use Windows XP on one parition (60GB). And Windows works.
In FreeBSD setup I have ad4 with my Windows parition which should be on ar0.
ar0 and ad6 are both empty.

I had contact with Soren Schmidt but he was not able to help me.

FYI: All OpenSource OS I have test have problems with my notebook (Except FC5):
Suse 10.1 - unable to detect the raid
Ubuntu 6.06 - unable to detect the raid
NetBSD - Hangs in boot
Debian - unable to detect the raid
Fedora Core 5 - works like a charm as long as I don't update to Kernel 2.6.17

Here is my dmesg:
